creator: A.J.Caines@halplant.com
text:
Updates conky to latest release - 1.4.9

For me, with -DWITH_XFT which now seems to actually make the Xft font work. This may or may not fix the (unreported by me) memory leark in 1.4.8, though that's not addressed in the changelog - http://conky.sourceforge.net/changelog.html

How-To-Repeat: 

Apply patch.
